# Major legitimate domains that should never be treated as known-bad, even if a
# public feed lists one of them (compromised-page reports and bad entries happen).
# update_feeds.py drops any feed host whose domain equals or is a subdomain of an
# entry here, so the auto-generated blocklist can't flag google.com and friends.
#
# This is a safety net, not an allowlist for scoring. One domain per line.
# Do NOT add shared free-hosting domains here (000webhostapp.com, weebly.com,
# etc.): real phishing lives on their subdomains and we want to keep those.

# search / portals / big tech
google.com
google.co.uk
googleapis.com
gstatic.com
youtube.com
youtu.be
bing.com
duckduckgo.com
yahoo.com
microsoft.com
microsoftonline.com
office.com
office365.com
live.com
outlook.com
windows.com
azure.com
apple.com
icloud.com
amazon.com
amazonaws.com
aws.amazon.com
cloudflare.com
akamai.com
fastly.net
wikipedia.org
mozilla.org

# social / comms
facebook.com
fb.com
instagram.com
whatsapp.com
twitter.com
x.com
linkedin.com
reddit.com
tiktok.com
snapchat.com
pinterest.com
telegram.org
discord.com
slack.com
zoom.us

# payments / finance
paypal.com
stripe.com
squareup.com
venmo.com
wise.com
intuit.com
visa.com
mastercard.com
americanexpress.com
chase.com
bankofamerica.com
wellsfargo.com
citi.com
capitalone.com
usbank.com
hsbc.com
barclays.com
santander.com

# commerce / shipping
ebay.com
etsy.com
walmart.com
target.com
bestbuy.com
costco.com
ups.com
fedex.com
usps.com
dhl.com

# cloud / dev / saas
github.com
gitlab.com
atlassian.com
dropbox.com
box.com
adobe.com
salesforce.com
oracle.com
ibm.com
servicenow.com
workday.com
okta.com
docusign.com
docusign.net
zendesk.com
hubspot.com

# media / streaming / cdn
netflix.com
spotify.com
hulu.com
disneyplus.com
twitch.tv
cloudfront.net
googleusercontent.com
